name: Huineng Technology Corp
business: Huineng Technology Corporation primarily provides application and website development, website design, and website maintenance services to companies and individual customers in Malaysia and Hong Kong.

exposures.sentence: We primarily provide application and website related services including application and website development, website design and website maintenance to companies and individual customers in Malaysia and Hong Kong.

catalysts.sentence: Our company plans to expand, and we aim to employ six individuals by the end of 2026.
